<!--
Thanks for sending a PR. Read CONTRIBUTING.md if you have not already.
A short, focused PR is always preferred over a sprawling one.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences. What does this change do? -->

## Motivation

<!-- Why does this change exist? Link to the issue. -->

Closes #

## Change type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor or cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build, tooling, or CI

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and the change respects the project principles.
- [ ] `npm test` passes locally.
- [ ] `npm run smoke` passes locally.
- [ ] If this changes user-facing copy, no em-dashes were introduced and the wording stays plain and direct.
- [ ] If this adds or alters a manifest permission, I documented it in the PR body and updated [PRIVACY.md](../PRIVACY.md) and the README permission table.
- [ ] If this changes storage, the schema version was incremented and migration notes are in the PR body.
- [ ] If this is user-visible, I updated [CHANGELOG.md](../CHANGELOG.md) under `[Unreleased]`.

## Screenshots or screen recordings

<!-- For UI changes. A still or short clip is enough. -->

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything that is non-obvious. Edge cases. Things you considered and rejected. -->
